## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Rachel Pasche to her new role at GrowthX, covering key systems, processes, and expectations.](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Rachel will work closely with Ada, supporting her accounts and learning GrowthX's content creation processes](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [GrowthX uses a mix of tools (Notion, Slack, AirOps, Airtable) to manage content workflows, though some may change soon](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=13.0)
  - [Content creation involves multiple AI-assisted steps, with human refinement throughout](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Rachel should focus on learning AirOps workflows and watching past client calls to get up to speed](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=549.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview and Expectations

  - [Rachel will support Ada's 4 accounts: Tier-o (dental services), Metadata (B2B advertising tool), PIXIS (similar space to Metadata)](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)
  - [Goal is to free up Ada's time from article refinement to focus more on strategy](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1015.0)
  - [Rachel may take on some client-facing responsibilities over time](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Emphasis on using automation to enable more strategic, creative work](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)

### Content Creation Process

  - [Aim for 10-15 articles per week per account](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)
  - [Weekly rhythm: Monday update, content ready for review pre-meeting, publish end of week](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)
  - [Use shared Slack channels for client communication](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [Leverage past call recordings in Fathom for context](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)

### Tools and Systems

  - [Notion: Houses client information, meeting notes, company briefs](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Slack: Internal and external channels for each client](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=1178.0)
  - [AirOps: Manages AI-assisted content creation workflows](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=2560.0)
      - [Multiple steps: research, outline, title generation, article creation, fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=2504.0)
      - [Integrates with various AI models (recently switched to Claude 3.7 for improved quality)](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=2621.0)
  - [Airtable: Content OS for tracking content pipeline (may be phased out)](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=2229.0)
  - [Fathom: Call recording and transcription tool](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3273.0)

### Onboarding Tasks

  - [Complete Day 1 tasks in onboarding doc](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3477.0)
  - [Watch training videos, especially on AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3499.0)
  - [Review past client kickoff calls and strategic sessions](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
  - [Familiarize with SEMrush and basic AI prompting](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3605.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to add Rachel to Circle for additional training access](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3470.0)
  - [Rachel to work through onboarding materials and trainings](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3477.0)
  - [Rachel to meet with Ada tomorrow for more specific guidance](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3439.0)
  - [Rachel to begin reviewing past client calls for context](https://fathom.video/share/QhByQ_LYoVDex7goWesc6eqdxrKJv4ss?tab=summary&timestamp=3449.0)
